tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests))
(def repos (distinct (map :repo prs)))
(def open-by-repo (frequencies (map :repo (filter #(= "open" (:state %)) prs))))
(def merged-linear-by-repo (frequencies (map :repo (filter #(and (= "merged" (:state %)) (not (nil? (:closes_linear %)))) prs))))
(def report
  (map (fn [repo]
         {:repo repo
          :open (get open-by-repo repo 0)
